response.justification: Mohammed has over 15 years of solid software engineering experience and commendable entrepreneurial initiative as a founder, meeting the minimum baseline for tenure. However, his background is predominantly in full-stack web and GIS development at the Senior/Staff level. He lacks the Director-level strategic leadership, enterprise cloud architecture experience, and deep, recognized Artificial Intelligence expertise required for a Principal AI Strategy role.
strengths: Over 15 years of diverse software engineering experience across web, mobile, and embedded systems.
Proven entrepreneurial drive as the founder of an open-source Geo-Data platform (GISCollective).
Demonstrated ability to inspire the tech community through public talks, workshops, and open-source contributions.
concerns: Lacks the required Director-level strategic leadership and enterprise influence expected of a Principal Engineer.
AI and machine learning experience is limited to a very recent role and lacks the depth expected for an AI platform strategist.
Does not possess the preferred advanced degree (Master's or PhD) or recognized industry expertise in an AI-related field.
